summary: Iteration 19 - Testing pricing strategy changes: 'od' prices, no hourly rates, new 'Likvidace a čištění pozemků' service, CTA button changes. Found and FIXED 2 issues on PricingPage (CTA buttons still said 'Rezervovat online' and 'Objednat nyní'). All other pages passed tests.

fixed_issues.issue: CTA button said 'Rezervovat online' instead of 'Nezávazná poptávka'
Calculator result button said 'Objednat nyní' instead of 'Poptat'

passed_tests: Service card 2 contains 'Likvidace a čištění pozemků'
CTA section button says 'Získat nezávaznou kalkulaci'
Found 'Likvidace a čištění pozemků' service option with 'Projektová cena'
Step 2 shows 'Cena bude stanovena po obhlídce' for land_clearing
No m² input shown for project-based service (correct)
No '400 Kč/hod' found anywhere in codebase
SEOHead components used in all main pages
critical_code_review_comments: All pricing strategy changes implemented correctly
New 'Likvidace a čištění pozemků' service added with Flame icon
Project-based services (land_clearing, garden_work, debris_hourly) correctly skip m² input
CTA buttons changed from 'Rezervovat'/'Objednat' to 'Nezávazná poptávka'/'Poptat'
Hero badge on PricingPage changed to 'Orientační ceny'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pricing strategy changes fully tested and verified. Two minor CTA button text issues on PricingPage were fixed during testing. All pages now show 'od' prices, no hourly rates, new 'Likvidace a čištění pozemků' service present, and CTA buttons use inquiry-style text ('Nezávazná poptávka', 'Poptat').

homepage.new_service: 'Likvidace a čištění pozemků' present with Flame icon

services_page.basic_services: No hourly rates, shows 'od 2,5 Kč/m²', 'Projektová cena', 'Dle rozsahu'
services_page.new_service: 'Likvidace a čištění pozemků' in basic services

booking_page.project_services: land_clearing shows 'Cena bude stanovena po obhlídce' instead of m² input
